outputs.description: The overall status of the script execution. "Success", "Failed". IndicatorEnrichment.Message A success message if the command runs successfully, otherwise a message that contains the error.
outputs.name: IndicatorEnrichment.Status

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results A list of all indicators found. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Type
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Value The indicator value. (e.g, IP, URL). IndicatorEnrichment.Results.MaxScore
outputs.name: The detected indicator type (e.g., "IP", "URL") that triggered this enrichment.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.MaxVerdict The max verdict of all the indicators found. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.TIMScore
outputs.name: The max score of all the indicators found.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.TIMCVSS The max CVSS of the indicator. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Status
outputs.name: The TIM score of the indicator.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.ModifiedTime The time the indicator was last modified. Date
outputs.name: The status of the indicator: "Manual" if the score was changed manually, "Fresh" if modified within the last week, "Stale" if modified more than a week ago, and "None" if never modified.

outputs.description: A list of all the underlying script results for the valid indicators. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.Source The source of the indicator.
outputs.name: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.Brand The brand of the indicator. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.DetectionEngines

outputs.name: The detection engines of the indicator.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.Score The score of the indicator. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.Verdict
outputs.name: Registered owner of the Autonomous System announcing the IP prefix.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.Address The IP address of the indicator. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Data
outputs.name: The verdict of the indicator.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Name The Domain of the indicator. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.Reliability
outputs.name: The URL of the indicator.

outputs.description: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.AdditionalFields All fields extracted from the indicator other then the main keys ("Brand", "Score", "Verdict", "DetectionEngines", "PositiveDetections", "Address"). list
outputs.name: The reliability of the Brand.

outputs.description: The source of the relationship. IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.EntityB The destination of the relationship.
outputs.name: IndicatorEnrichment.Results.Results.AdditionalFields.Relationships.EntityA

For example, a confidence level of 90 for the 'malware' threat type category means that the vendor is confident that its 90% malware.
